summary: Product Guidance System testing complete. Backend 100% (12/12 tests). Frontend mostly working with one issue: guide bubble not visible on /app Dashboard page (works on /app/story-video-studio). Stuck hint, guide panel, dismiss, CTA navigation all working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Guide bubble (data-testid=guide-bubble) not visible on /app Dashboard page, but works correctly on /app/story-video-studio
ui_bugs.details: The guide bubble renders at App.js level but doesn't appear on Dashboard. Works on story-video-studio page. Likely z-index or layout issue with Dashboard's full-screen hero section.

ui_bugs.issue: Journey progress bar not visible on /app Dashboard page (mobile), but works on /app/story-video-studio
ui_bugs.details: Same root cause as guide bubble - component renders at App.js level but Dashboard layout may be hiding it.

issues: Cookie consent banner (z-[9999]) blocks clicks on guide bubble (z-[9970]) and stuck hint close button. Consider lowering cookie banner z-index or raising guide z-index.

action_items: Fix guide bubble visibility on /app Dashboard page - investigate z-index or layout conflict with Dashboard hero section
Fix journey progress bar visibility on /app Dashboard page (mobile)
Consider adjusting z-index: cookie banner (z-[9999]) vs guide components (z-[9970]) to prevent click blocking
critical_code_review_comments: GuideAssistant and JourneyProgressBar are rendered at App.js level (lines 387, 393) but don't appear on Dashboard page - likely Dashboard's full-screen layout is covering them
Cookie consent banner z-index (9999) is higher than guide components (9970), causing click interception issues

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Guide bubble/panel/stuck hint work on story-video-studio, but not on Dashboard

seed_data_creation: Reset user_progress.guide_dismissed=false and completed_steps=[] for test user via MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Guidance System backend APIs fully working. Frontend guide components work on /app/story-video-studio but NOT on /app Dashboard. The issue is likely that Dashboard page has a full-screen layout that covers the fixed-position guide components. Cookie consent banner z-index (9999) is higher than guide (9970), causing click blocking. Test user ID: ea3b038c-d523-4a49-9fa5-e00c761fa4aa. To reset guide for testing: db.user_progress.update_one({user_id: 'ea3b038c-d523-4a49-9fa5-e00c761fa4aa'}, {$set: {guide_dismissed: false, completed_steps: []}})

verified_features.details: Returns current_step, completed_steps, features_used, guide_dismissed, total_generations, total_shares
Updates step, adds features, increments generation/share counters
Visible after 2s delay, clickable to open panel
Shows 'Your Next Step' title, context message, 'Do it now' CTA, journey mini-map, dismiss button
'Don't show again' sets guide_dismissed=true, bubble disappears
Appears on story-video-studio page with page-specific message
X button closes the hint (with force=True due to cookie banner)
Visible on /app/story-video-studio but NOT on /app Dashboard
Not visible - 0 elements in DOM on Dashboard page
Login works for test user and admin

rca_of_the_issue: Guide bubble and journey progress bar are rendered at App.js level (outside Routes) but don't appear on /app Dashboard page. The Dashboard page (Dashboard.js) has a full-screen hero section and custom layout that may be covering the fixed-position guide components. The components work correctly on /app/story-video-studio which has a different layout. Additionally, cookie consent banner has z-index 9999 which is higher than guide components (9970), causing click interception.
